title: Sprint 10: Strata-Nebula Integration
description:
Wire strata queries into the context/prime pipeline (hot path) and session queries (warm path).

## Deliverables
- Context-triggered augmentation: anchor motes scoring above threshold auto-query their corpus
- mote prime 'Available strata' section when anchors score above threshold
- Session strata query logging and mote session-end summary
- Respect strata.context_augment config (chunks_per_corpus, max_augment_corpora)

## Stories
- 13.4, 13.5

## Exit Criteria
- Anchor motes in traversal results auto-query their corpus
- mote prime shows available reference material
- Performance maintained < 100ms with augmentation
- 3+ same-corpus queries produce crystallization hint at session-end

title: Sprint 7: Constellations + Obsidian Compatibility
description:
Constellation synthesis and Obsidian vault compatibility.

## Deliverables
- mote constellation list: tag clusters with existing constellation flags
- mote constellation synthesize: find tags with 3+ motes, create hub motes (type=constellation)
- Obsidian: [[mote-id]] wikilinks in bodies, standard vault format, no plugin needed
- constellations.jsonl: tag, constellation_mote_id, member_mote_ids, created_at

## Stories
- 5.1, 5.2, 5.3, 8.1, 8.2

## Exit Criteria
- mote constellation list shows clusters
- mote constellation synthesize creates hub motes with member links
- Opening .memory/ as Obsidian vault shows connected graph

title: Sprint 2: Graph Linking (link/unlink, bidirectionality, --ready)
description: Stories 2.1-2.2, 3.1-3.2. Add mote link/unlink with bidirectional rules, inverse depends_on/blocks pairs, supersedes auto-deprecation, and mote ls --ready filter.
close_reason: Sprint 2 complete: link/unlink with bidirectionality, --ready filter, 63 tests passing

title: Sprint 5: Nebula health & observability
description: Stories 5.1, 4.5, 7.2, 11.3, 2.3: mote doctor, mote stats, constellation list, tags audit, context --planning, ls deprecation indicator. All deterministic, no LLM.
close_reason: Sprint 5 complete: mote doctor, mote stats, constellation list, tags audit, context --planning, ls deprecation. 110 tests, all smoke tests pass.

title: Sprint 12: Strata Crystallization + Migration
description:
Dream-strata integration and MEMORY.md migration tool.

## Deliverables
- Strata crystallization candidate detection in PreScanner (from query_log.jsonl)
- Corpus health review: stale corpora, unused corpora, anchor hint drift
- mote migrate: parse MEMORY.md sections -> typed motes with origin classification -> index rebuild -> archive original

## Stories
- 13.7, 13.8, 9.1

## Exit Criteria
- Dream cycle proposes crystallization for frequently queried strata topics
- Corpus health flags surface during dream runs
- mote migrate converts MEMORY.md to typed motes, archives original

title: Sprint 3: Scoring + Traversal Engine
description:
ScoreEngine, GraphTraverser, SeedSelector — pure engine, no CLI. Heavy unit testing.

## Deliverables
- ScoreEngine with full formula (arch doc lines 279-351)
- GraphTraverser BFS (arch doc lines 357-435)
- SeedSelector + ambient signal handling
- AmbientContext collection (git branch, recent files, prompt keywords)

## Scoring Formula
raw = weight + edge_bonus + status_penalty + retrieval_bonus + salience_bonus + tag_specificity + interference
final = raw x recency_factor
All parameters from config. Threshold 0.25, max 12 results.

## Stories
- 4.4 (scoring), 4.5 (tag specificity)

## Exit Criteria
- Each scoring component verified independently
- BFS respects hop limits (2), score thresholds, max results
- Seed selector combines topic + ambient signals
- Benchmark: scoring 500 motes < 5ms

title: Sprint 3: Scoring Engine + Context Loading + Priming
description: Stories 4.1, 4.3, 4.4, 4.6. ScoreEngine (8-component formula), GraphTraverser (BFS with spreading activation), SeedSelector (ambient signals), mote context and mote prime commands.
close_reason: Sprint 3 complete: ScoreEngine, GraphTraverser, SeedSelector, mote context + prime. 85 tests.

title: Sprint 9: Strata Core (BM25)
description:
Full strata engine with BM25 search, corpus management, anchor motes.

## Deliverables
- BM25Index: Search(), BuildBM25Index() (~150 LOC, k1=1.2, b=0.75)
- Tokenizer: lowercase, split on [a-zA-Z0-9_]+, stop words, no stemming
- Chunker: heading-aware, function-level, sliding-window strategies
- StrataManager: AddCorpus, Query, Update, Rebuild, Remove, List, Stats
- Query log writer (query_log.jsonl)
- CLI: mote strata add/query/ls/update/rebuild/rm/stats
- Anchor mote creation with strata fields

## Stories
- 13.1, 13.2, 13.3, 13.6

## Exit Criteria
- Corpus CRUD works end-to-end
- BM25 search of 10k chunks < 50ms
- Anchor motes created with correct strata fields
- Every query logged

title: Sprint 6: Crystallize + Session-End + Access Flush
description:
Crystallization, access batch flushing, salience classification, and session-end warm path.

## Deliverables
- mote crystallize <id>: infer type/origin, draft mote, open EDITOR
- mote crystallize --candidates: list closed items without corresponding motes
- mote session-end: flush access batch, crystallization candidates, link suggestions
- Access batch system: Record() appends to JSONL, Flush() updates mote files
- ClassifyOrigin(): keyword matching for failure/revert/hotfix indicators

## Stories
- 6.1, 6.2, 11.1, 11.2, 12.8

## Exit Criteria
- mote crystallize opens editor with pre-populated draft
- mote session-end flushes access data and produces suggestions
- Origin classification identifies failure-related issues
- Access batch never rewrites mote files on read — only on flush

- go mod init motes, go get cobra + yaml.v3
- Mote struct (arch doc lines 78-121), ParseMote(), SerializeMote()
- GenerateID(), base36Encode()
- Config struct, DefaultConfig(), LoadConfig()
- AtomicWrite() utility
- Bare cobra root command
- Makefile (build, test, vet, install)

## Stories
- 1.1 partial (struct + parse only, no CLI yet)

## Exit Criteria
- go build ./cmd/mote produces binary
- go test ./... and go vet ./... pass
- Parse/serialize round-trip preserves all 25+ frontmatter fields
- ID generation: no collisions across 1000 concurrent calls

title: Sprint 4: Context + Prime CLI
description:
mote context <topic>, mote context <issue-id>, mote prime with contradiction detection.

## Deliverables
- mote context: seed -> traverse -> score -> rank -> format + contradiction warnings + batch access
- mote prime: active tasks -> context for top 2 -> ambient signals -> sectioned output
- Contradiction detection (Story 4.6): active contradicts pairs in results -> warning section
- Output sections: Active work, Relevant decisions, Key lessons, Prior explorations
- Dream cycle notices (pending visions, overdue nudge)

## Stories
- 4.1, 4.2, 4.3, 4.6

## Exit Criteria
- mote context oauth returns scored, ranked motes
- mote prime produces sectioned output
- Contradictions surfaced as warnings
- Performance: < 100ms for 500 motes

title: Sprint 11: Dream Cycle
description:
Full 4-stage dream pipeline: pre-scan -> batch (Sonnet) -> reconciliation (Opus) -> vision output.

## Deliverables
- DreamOrchestrator: Run() with 4-stage pipeline
- PreScanner: deterministic candidate identification (9 categories)
- BatchConstructor: hybrid batching (60% tag-clustered, 40% interleaved)
- PromptBuilder: text/template for batch + reconciliation prompts
- ClaudeInvoker: claude CLI via os/exec
- ResponseParser: extract JSON from response, validate visions
- LucidLog: cross-batch accumulating journal (prune at 2000 tokens)
- VisionWriter: draft + final JSONL output
- VisionReviewer: interactive terminal review (accept/edit/reject/defer)
- CLI: mote dream [--dry-run] [--review]
- testdata/dream/ fixtures for recorded Claude responses

## Stories
- 12.1, 12.2, 12.3, 12.4, 12.5, 12.6, 12.7

## Exit Criteria
- mote dream runs full pipeline
- mote dream --dry-run outputs plan without modifying files
- mote dream --review presents interactive vision review
- Failed batches logged and skipped, pipeline continues
- All tests pass with recorded fixtures (no real Claude calls)

title: Sprint 2: Graph Linking
description:
All link types with bidirectionality rules, unlink, --ready filter.

## Deliverables
- Link type registry with bidirectionality table
- AddLink(), RemoveLink() functions
- mote link A <type> B, mote unlink A <type> B commands
- --ready filter on mote ls

## Bidirectionality Rules
- relates_to: bidirectional (stored both ways)
- contradicts: bidirectional
- depends_on: directional (inverse blocks auto-populated)
- builds_on: directional (source only; reverse ref in index only)
- supersedes: directional (also triggers deprecation of target)
- caused_by: directional (source only)
- informed_by: directional (source only)

## Stories
- 2.1, 2.2, 2.3, 3.1, 3.2

## Exit Criteria
- Each link type writes correct frontmatter + index edges
- supersedes auto-deprecates target
- unlink removes link + inverse
- --ready returns only unblocked motes

## Exit Criteria
